title: auth: broken clock produces ts=0, relay rejects own nonce
description: core/src/auth.rs:27: new_challenge() calls .unwrap_or_default() on the system clock. A pre-epoch or broken clock produces ts=0. The relay sends this nonce to the client, client signs it, relay then calls nonce_is_fresh() which computes age = now - 0 >> CHALLENGE_TTL_SECS (300) and rejects it — the relay rejected its own nonce. Client gets opaque AUTH_FAILED. Fix: bail! with a clear error rather than silently producing ts=0.
